case_title: MARTIN BARAJAS ET AL VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC., LP ET AL

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED MAR-09-2016, SERVED FEB-18-2016 (TRANSACTION ID # 58784619) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARAJAS, MARTIN AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES INC., LP
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS MARTIN BARAJAS AND OTHERS' MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED AND THIS CASE IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND DEFENDANT UBER FILED A STATEMENT OF NON-OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-14-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Burton of Audet & Partners, LLP telephone number 415-568-2555 for all Plaintiffs.
Karin Cogbill of Littler Medelson, P.C. telephone number 408-998-4150 for Defendant Uber Technologies.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS MARTIN BARAJAS and others' Motion To Compel Arbitration is granted and this case is stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration. No opposition filed and defendant Uber filed a statement of non-opposition. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
